build_board_blockers.summary: The regenerated BA-10 trace matrix now reports 201 implemented / 2 partial / 9 gap scenarios; explicit smoke-coverage targets, implemented-slice traceability, reproducible validation-command mappings, a guarded repo-readiness summary, and a durable latest validation-suite report snapshot cover bootstrap, tailoring, discovery, send, feedback, review-query, downstream supervisor follow-through, the persisted `jhc-chat` startup dashboard surface, explicit review-queue or change-summary reads, read-only idempotency for repeated chat-state helper queries, posting-abandon control, and idle-timeout auto-resume after unexpected chat exit, but maintenance automation and deeper chat guidance or override workflows still remain open.

commands.title: Acceptance report guards
commands.command: python3.11 -m pytest tests/test_acceptance_traceability.py tests/test_blocker_audit.py tests/test_quality_validation.py tests/test_repo_readiness.py
commands.description: Keeps the committed BA-10 acceptance, blocker, readiness, and validation-suite reports synchronized with repo code, tests, and state references.

commands.title: Smoke harness flow
commands.description: Replays the committed bootstrap -> tailoring -> discovery -> send -> feedback -> review-query smoke path.

commands.title: Bootstrap regressions
commands.description: Confirms bootstrap prerequisites, canonical schema migration, and shared artifact contracts stay valid.

commands.title: Tailoring regressions
commands.description: Confirms tailoring bootstrap, deterministic artifact generation, compile verification, and mandatory review gates stay intact.

commands.title: Discovery regressions
commands.description: Confirms people search, shortlist materialization, enrichment, discovery artifacts, and provider-budget behavior stay intact.

commands.title: Outreach regressions
commands.description: Confirms send-set readiness, draft persistence, safe send execution, and repeat-outreach guardrails stay intact.

commands.title: Delivery feedback regressions
commands.description: Confirms immediate or delayed feedback ingestion, normalized event persistence, and delivery outcome artifacts stay intact.

commands.title: Supervisor downstream hardening regressions
commands.description: Confirms incident-first selector ordering, existing-run reuse, bounded role-targeted progression through `delivery_feedback`, and contact-rooted general-learning follow-through while keeping the remaining maintenance-selector gap explicit.

commands.title: Runtime control regressions
commands.description: Covers launchd plist wiring, control commands, chat lifecycle state, delayed feedback runners, and explicit negative control cases.

commands.title: Review surface regressions
commands.description: Verifies persisted grouped review surfaces and traceability reads that back the chat/review boundary.

commands.title: Runtime pack regressions
commands.description: Confirms generated runtime scaffolding stays honest about current action-catalog and maintenance placeholder status.

open_acceptance_gap_summaries.title: Maintenance workflow and artifacts are not implemented
Chat review and control are still missing deeper expert-guidance workflows
